TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Salvador_Sánchez_Cerén, title = Salvador_Sánchez_Cerén, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salvador_Sánchez_Cerén} }

S.FORM: Salvador Sánchez Cerén ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 6, Salvador Sánchez Cerén, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw El salvador ta' misuw hya' ga Salvador Sánchez Cerén, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Salvador Sánchez Cerén ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 6, Salvador Sánchez Cerén, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw El salvador ta' misuw hya' ga Salvador Sánchez Cerén, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: s~ɕal*a*or s~ɕ*nʦ~ʨħez ʦ~ʨer*n rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, s~ɕal*a*or s~ɕ*nʦ~ʨħez ʦ~ʨer*n, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw el s~ɕal*a*or taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕal*a*or s~ɕ*nʦ~ʨħez ʦ~ʨer*n, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
